title: valerianella umbilicata f. patellaria
intro: Valerianella umbilicata f. patellaria, also known as the small-petalled cornflower, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Valerianella genus, a type of wild lettuce or corn salad. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Valerianella umbilicata f. patellaria can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in salads or as a cooked green.
